subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim to the Holy Land! Thousands upon thousands of Israelites have hastened to this glorious realm to gain their portion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر ارض مقدس هزاران هزار اسراایل باین اقلیم جلیل شتافتند تا بهره و نصیب
subcodes.subjects: @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Shrines and Holy places
